text.title: gov-sonarqube-ai-code-gate Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gov-sonarqube-ai-code-gate as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Granting a per-PR "exception" via the SonarCloud UI to merge a failing gate so the agent can move on.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The exception removes the audit signal — leadership sees green dashboards while the AI defect class compounds; subsequent agents learn the gate is optional.

failure-mode.description: Adding NOSONAR with no reason text so the agent can ship a clean PR before a deadline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Untraceable suppressions accumulate; the AI defect class returns to the codebase and the gate becomes cosmetic.
